bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: We're winning 50% of staff rounds but dying to spear and daggers in open fights — posture is too passive for a high-kill staff build. Lower minTradeAdvantage from 0.3 to 0.2 to engage more often when we have advantage (we're killing 5+ per win). Reduce threat aversion from 120→100 to stop over-fleei

lessons: Staff vs. staff duels are lethal — HexMind, Archmage, and Reaper killed us in 4 of last 10 rounds; disengage after first hit or retreat to cover.
Lancer (spear) killed us in 4 of last 10 rounds — spear has 447+ sightings in last 10 rounds; avoid open ground and never trade range with spear.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in 2 of last 10 rounds and has 73+ historical kills — bow sightings spiked to 166 in round 578; retreat behind obstacles or use hazard_storm to break line of sight.
Sword users (Shredder, Lancer, Hook, Reaper, Executioner, Archmage, Warden, Juggernaut) were killed by us in 5 of last 6 rounds with 17 total kills — prioritize isolated sword-wielders; they have low
Shield users spiked in round 574 (113 sightings) and we died 100% of the time engaging them — never charge shielded opponents; flank or wait for them to drop shield.
fast_zone and pickup_surge are our strongest modifiers — we won both rounds with 9 total kills and 0 deaths; actively seek these modifiers and engage aggressively when present.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Spear has superior range and kill efficiency against the dominant sword meta, and our current staff performance is inconsistent despite high usage.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: We're dying to bows and spears from range — lowering targetThreatAversion from 120 to 100 lets us engage threats more proactively instead of over-retreating. Reducing kiteRangeBias from 3 to 2 closes the gap slightly to reduce exposure while still maintaining distance. Disable retreatFireWhileKiting

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Grapple is dying consistently to bow, shield, and staff at mid-range. Lowering grappleCloseMinGap to 0.3 forces instant melee closure to negate range disadvantages. Pushing kiteRangeBias to -3.0 maximizes pressure into close quarters where grapple dominates. Increasing targetThreatAversion to 110 re

lessons: Staff dominates sword users (21 kills in last 6 rounds) — prioritize Warden, Fortress, Lancer, Executioner, and Deadeye as primary targets.
Bow users (Deadeye) killed us 3 times in last 4 rounds — treat all bow users as high-threat snipers; maintain cover and avoid open sightlines.
Grapple users (Hook) killed us in 2 of last 3 rounds — avoid chokepoints and narrow corridors, especially during pickup_surge or fast_zone modifiers.
Sword users (Warden, Executioner, Lancer) are our most common killers — but we kill them 5:1 when we engage aggressively; use staff’s range to control space and close fast.
Staff win rate drops to 0% in fast_zone rounds (0-3 record) — avoid prolonged engagements; prioritize quick kills and exit before zone collapse.
Shield users (Fortress) killed us when stationary — never face shield users head-on; flank or lure into open ground where staff range dominates.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has 24% win rate (41/171) overall and is killing sword users at a 5:1 ratio in recent rounds — no evidence to switch.

lessons: Hook (grapple) killed you in 4 of last 6 rounds — grapple vs grapple is a loss; avoid mid-range duels, close instantly or retreat behind cover.
Fortress (shield) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — shield blocks grapple and negates mobility; never duel head-on, lure into hazard_storm or flank with sword users.
Bow users (Deadeye) killed you in 2 of last 10 rounds — avoid open terrain during hazard_storm or pickup_surge; use walls and narrow paths to negate range.
Sword users (Reaper, Valkyrie, Shredder) are your most reliable kills — you got 5 sword kills in last 10 rounds with 0 deaths to them when you initiated; prioritize isolated sword users.
Grapple has 0 wins in last 10 rounds and is being consistently countered by shield and staff — it lacks damage and control against defensive or high-mobility bots.
Staff users (Reaper) killed you in 2 of last 10 rounds — they outdamage and outrange grapple; only engage with full cover or after disabling their mobility.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: You’ve achieved 5 kills against sword users in the last 10 rounds with zero deaths to them when initiating, and sword is the only weapon with consistent kill success against high-threat opponents like Reaper and Fortress.
